videos.headline: Oklahoma squeaks out a win after game-winning FG vs. West Virginia
videos.description: Oklahoma's Gabe Brkic drills the game-winning field goal in the final moments to seal a 16-13 win over West Virginia.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oklahoma squeaks out a win after game-winning FG vs. West Virginia) 2021/09/25 ESHEET

videos.headline: Spencer Rattler gets Oklahoma on the board with TD pass
videos.description: Spencer Rattler completes a nice pass to Austin Stogner for a 5-yard Oklahoma touchdown to tie the game at 7-7.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Spencer Rattler gets Oklahoma on the board with TD pass) 2021/09/25 ESHEET

videos.headline: Garrett Greene runs in for West Virginia TD
videos.description: Garrett Greene keeps the snap and uses his legs to get into the end zone for a 2-yard West Virginia touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Garrett Greene runs in for West Virginia TD) 2021/09/25 ESHEET

videos.headline: West Virginia defense gets unreal INT on Spencer Rattler
videos.description: Spencer Rattler has his pass intercepted by Jackie Matthews who swoops in and dives to make the grab on the deflected ball.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (West Virginia defense gets unreal INT on Spencer Rattler) 2021/09/25 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oklahoma fans chant for Spencer Rattler to be benched after INT
videos.description: Oklahoma fans advocate for backup quarterback Caleb Williams to come into the game for Spencer Rattler with a loud "We want Caleb!" chant.
